title: Integrate Hero Section into Main Layout
description: Add the HeroSection component to the main playground page, ensuring it appears above the chat interface.
details: Import the HeroSection component into the main page (e.g., pages/index.tsx or app/page.tsx). Place it above the ChatArea and ChatInput components, maintaining a logical and visually appealing layout. Adjust spacing and responsiveness as needed so the hero does not interfere with chat functionality on desktop or mobile.
test_strategy: Load the main playground page and verify the hero section appears at the top, does not overlap with chat components, and remains responsive. Test on multiple screen sizes. Confirm that the chat remains fully functional.

title: Add Styling and Responsiveness to Hero Section
description: Ensure the HeroSection is visually appealing and adapts gracefully to different screen sizes.
details: Enhance the HeroSection with CSS for spacing, typography, and optional visuals. Use global styles (globals.css) and/or component-scoped styles as appropriate. Ensure the section looks good on both desktop and mobile. Follow accessibility and WCAG guidelines for color contrast and font sizes.
test_strategy: Test the hero section on various devices and browsers. Use browser dev tools to simulate mobile viewports. Run accessibility tools to check color contrast and font scaling. Visually inspect for layout issues.

title: Write Unit and Integration Tests for Hero Section
description: Add tests to verify the HeroSection renders correctly and integrates with the main page without breaking existing functionality.
details: Use React Testing Library and Jest to write unit tests for the HeroSection: check for correct rendering of headline, description, and any visuals. Add integration tests to ensure the section appears on the main page and does not interfere with chat interactions. Mock props and user interactions as needed.
test_strategy: Run all tests and ensure 100% coverage for the HeroSection. Verify that existing chat functionality tests still pass. Check for regressions in the main page layout and user flow.

title: Design Hero Section Component
description: Create a new reusable HeroSection React component to introduce the chat playground and provide context to users.
details: Implement a functional React component (e.g., HeroSection.tsx) using TypeScript. The hero should include a prominent headline, a brief description of the playground's purpose, and optional supporting visuals (icon or illustration). Ensure accessibility with semantic HTML and ARIA labels. Style the component using existing global CSS or scoped styles for consistency with the app's look and feel.
test_strategy: Render the component in isolation and verify: headline and description are visible, semantic HTML is used, ARIA labels are present, and styles match the application's design. Use Storybook or a test page for visual inspection. Run accessibility checks (e.g., axe).
